title: Move navigation and header widgets from pew_pew_plaza to turbo_widgets
description: Move the breadcrumbs, side nav bar, hero header, and view header widget families. These are navigation-oriented and page-header showcase widgets.
context:
Files to move:

**Breadcrumbs** — pew_pew_plaza `lib/core/ui/widgets/t_breadcrumbs/` → turbo_widgets `lib/src/widgets/navigation/t_breadcrumbs/`:
- t_breadcrumbs.dart — Animated breadcrumb path with enter/exit animations per segment. Imports: FontFamily, context_extension, TDurations, HoverBuilder. Contains _SegmentEntry, _BreadcrumbGhostButton, _BreadcrumbBackButton, _BreadcrumbRootButton, _BreadcrumbSegment, _NoScrollbarBehavior.
- t_breadcrumbs_bar.dart — Blurred bar container for breadcrumbs. Imports: context_extension, TProvider (TSizes).

**Side Nav Bar** — pew_pew_plaza `lib/core/ui/widgets/t_side_nav_bar/` → turbo_widgets `lib/src/widgets/navigation/t_side_nav_bar/`:
- t_side_nav_bar.dart — Main sidebar with blur, corner brackets, beam divider. Imports: FontFamily, context_extension, TDurations, TBeamDivider, TProvider, t_side_nav_panel_corner_bracket.
- NOTE: turbo_widgets already has `lib/src/widgets/navigation/t_side_nav_bar.dart` (single file). Read it to understand the difference. The pew_pew_plaza version is a directory with a single file. Decide whether to replace the existing file or place the new one alongside. If the existing one is a different widget, keep both. If it's the same widget, replace with the pew_pew_plaza version.

**Hero Header** — pew_pew_plaza `lib/core/ui/widgets/t_hero_header.dart` → turbo_widgets `lib/src/widgets/headers/t_hero_header.dart`:
- Dashboard hero section. Imports: FontFamily, context_extension, TMetricTile, TStatusIndicator. Contains _StatusBar, _Separator, _VersionSection, _VersionNumber, _VersionNumberPainter, _MetricsRow.

**View Header** — pew_pew_plaza `lib/core/ui/widgets/t_view_header/` (8 files) → turbo_widgets `lib/src/widgets/headers/t_view_header/`:
- t_view_header.dart — Main header. Imports: FontFamily, context_extension, TCardShell, TProvider, TViewHeaderEditButton, TViewHeaderGlowPainter, TViewHeaderMetaRow, TViewHeaderThumbnail, TViewHeaderTypeLabel, turbo_widgets (TDeviceType).
- t_view_header_glow_painter.dart — CustomPainter. Pure Flutter imports only.
- t_view_header_thumbnail_frame_painter.dart — CustomPainter. Pure Flutter imports only.
- t_view_header_thumbnail.dart — Imports: t_emoji_picker_popover, TProvider, TViewHeaderThumbnailFramePainter.
- t_view_header_type_label.dart — Imports: FontFamily, TProvider (TColors).
- t_view_header_edit_button.dart — Imports: hover_icon_button.
- t_view_header_location_button.dart — Imports: FontFamily.
- t_view_header_meta_row.dart — Imports: FontFamily, TProvider, TViewHeaderLocationButton.
instructions: Update this task status to 'in-progress' immediately.
Read ALL source files from pew_pew_plaza listed above.
Read the EXISTING turbo_widgets `lib/src/widgets/navigation/t_side_nav_bar.dart` to understand if it conflicts with the pew_pew_plaza version.
Read turbo_widgets files from tasks 1-6 for correct import paths.
Use `cp` (Bash) to copy each source file to its target path, then use apply_edits to fix imports. NEVER rewrite files from scratch. Replace FontFamily.xxx with TFontFamilies.xxx via apply_edits.
THeroHeader imports TMetricTile and TStatusIndicator — those come from task 6 (content widgets). Use the turbo_widgets paths from task 6.
TViewHeaderThumbnail imports t_emoji_picker_popover — that comes from task 5 (interactive widgets). Use the turbo_widgets path from task 5.
For the side nav bar conflict: if the existing turbo_widgets file is a DIFFERENT widget, rename the pew_pew_plaza version (e.g., t_side_nav_bar_showcase.dart). If it's the SAME widget, replace it.
Do NOT add exports to the barrel file — task 9.
acceptance_criteria: Side nav bar exists in lib/src/widgets/navigation/t_side_nav_bar/ (or resolved location)
No file imports anything from pew_pew_plaza
Cross-widget references (TMetricTile, TStatusIndicator, t_emoji_picker_popover, TCardShell, TBeamDivider, HoverBuilder, hover_icon_button) all point to turbo_widgets paths
constraints: CRITICAL: Use `cp` to copy source files from pew_pew_plaza to target paths, then use apply_edits to fix imports. NEVER rewrite files from scratch — agents hallucinate content when rewriting. Copy first, patch imports second.
Handle the existing t_side_nav_bar.dart gracefully — do not destroy existing work
goals: All navigation and header showcase widgets are self-contained in turbo_widgets
non_goals: Merging the two side nav bar implementations
worklog: Copied 12 files via cp, then patched imports with apply_edits. Files created: lib/src/widgets/navigation/t_breadcrumbs/t_breadcrumbs.dart (4 import fixes + 3 FontFamily→TFontFamilies), lib/src/widgets/navigation/t_breadcrumbs/t_breadcrumbs_bar.dart (2 import fixes), lib/src/widgets/navigation/t_side_nav_bar/t_side_nav_bar.dart (6→7 import fixes + 3 FontFamily→TFontFamilies), lib/src/widgets/headers/t_hero_header.dart (4 import fixes + 6 FontFamily→TFontFamilies), lib/src/widgets/headers/t_view_header/t_view_header.dart (10 import fixes + 2 FontFamily→TFontFamilies), lib/src/widgets/headers/t_view_header/t_view_header_glow_painter.dart (straight copy), lib/src/widgets/headers/t_view_header/t_view_header_thumbnail_frame_painter.dart (straight copy), lib/src/widgets/headers/t_view_header/t_view_header_thumbnail.dart (3 import fixes), lib/src/widgets/headers/t_view_header/t_view_header_type_label.dart (3 import fixes), lib/src/widgets/headers/t_view_header/t_view_header_edit_button.dart (1 import fix), lib/src/widgets/headers/t_view_header/t_view_header_location_button.dart (2 import fixes), lib/src/widgets/headers/t_view_header/t_view_header_meta_row.dart (4 import fixes). Side nav bar conflict resolved: existing t_side_nav_bar.dart is a DIFFERENT widget (layout-agnostic with TButtonConfig map). Pew_pew version placed in subdirectory t_side_nav_bar/ — both coexist. All diffs verified import-only. Zero pew_pew_plaza imports.

on_complete.update_downstream_tasks: Document how the side nav bar conflict was resolved. Add all file paths to task 9.
